---
title: "test_sanitize_thesaurus.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_sanitize_thesaurus.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.45
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.98
---

## Intent
The `test_sanitize_thesaurus.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_sanitize_clusters_logic, test_sanitize_file_operation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_sanitize_clusters_logic, test_sanitize_file_operation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.data.sanitize_thesaurus](file://src.tools.data.sanitize_thesaurus)
- [src.tools.data.sanitize_thesaurus](file://src.tools.data.sanitize_thesaurus)

### Exports
- `test_sanitize_clusters_logic`
- `test_sanitize_file_operation`
